mapper.select:
SELECT po.id, po.code, po.title, po.total_amount, po.status, po.created_at, po.requested_delivery_date FROM purchase_order po WHERE po.status = '임시저장' AND po.is_requested = false ORDER BY po.created_at DESC
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT po.id AS po_id, po.code, po.title, po.status, po.requested_delivery_date, po.total_amount, u.name AS user_name, u.email AS user_email, s.id AS supplier_id, s.code AS supplier_code, s.name AS supplier_name, s.ceo_name, s.business_number, s.zipcode, s.company_phone, s.address, s.signed_at FROM purchase_order po JOIN user u ON po.user_id = u.id JOIN supplier s ON po.supplier_id = s.id WHERE po.id = #{id} AND po.is_requested = false AND po.status = '임시저장'

SELECT pop.id AS pop_id, pop.no, pop.quantity, pop.remarks, p.id AS product_id, p.code AS product_code, p.name AS product_name, p.purchase_price, p.purchase_unit, p.spec, pt.name AS product_type_name, pg.name AS product_group_name, pa.name AS product_attribute_name FROM purchase_order_product pop JOIN product p ON pop.product_id = p.id LEFT JOIN product_type pt ON p.product_type_id = pt.id LEFT JOIN product_group pg ON p.product_group_id = pg.id LEFT JOIN product_attribute pa ON p.product_attribute_id = pa.id WHERE pop.purchase_order_id = #{id} ORDER BY pop.no ASC

SELECT po.id, po.code, po.title, po.total_amount, po.status, po.created_at, po.requested_delivery_date FROM purchase_order po WHERE po.status != '임시저장' AND po.supplier_id = #{supplierId} ORDER BY po.created_at DESC
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT po.id AS po_id, po.code, po.title, po.status, po.requested_delivery_date, po.total_amount, u.name AS user_name, u.email AS user_email, s.id AS supplier_id, s.code AS supplier_code, s.name AS supplier_name, s.ceo_name, s.business_number, s.zipcode, s.company_phone, s.address, s.signed_at FROM purchase_order po JOIN user u ON po.user_id = u.id JOIN supplier s ON po.supplier_id = s.id WHERE po.id = #{id} AND po.status != '임시저장'

SELECT po.id, po.code, po.title, po.total_amount, po.status, po.created_at, po.requested_delivery_date FROM purchase_order po WHERE po.status = #{status} ORDER BY po.created_at DESC
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT po.id, po.code, po.title, po.total_amount, po.status, po.created_at, po.requested_delivery_date FROM purchase_order po WHERE po.code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{code}, '%') ORDER BY po.created_at DESC
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT po.id, po.code, po.title, po.total_amount, po.status, po.created_at, po.requested_delivery_date FROM purchase_order po WHERE po.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{title}, '%') ORDER BY po.created_at DESC
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM purchase_order WHERE status = '임시저장' AND is_requested = false
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM purchase_order WHERE status != '임시저장' AND supplier_id = #{supplierId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM purchase_order WHERE code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{code}, '%')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM purchase_order WHERE title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{title}, '%')
